chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-181 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 22.09.2025. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Channa, Advocate for Petitioner a/w Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G Sindh. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, A.P.G for the State a/w SIP Abdul Jabbar from PS Hala New & SIP Faheem Hussain from DIG Office, Hyderabad. Mr. Khush Muhammad, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.5 & 7, which is taken on record. Respondent No.5 (Muhammad Ameen) is also present in-person and submitted statement accompanied with bio-metric affidavit stating therein that neither he harassed the Petitioner nor in future he would cause any kind of harassment to the Petitioner in any manner. An official from PS Hala New, District Matiari present submits that on 08.05.2025 one lady namely Bano wd/o Lakha Dino appeared at PS and lodged FIR bearing crime No.94 of 2025 against the Petitioner, which case after investigation has been challaned and the Petitioner is on bail in that case. He submitted copy of FIR, which is taken on record. Learned A.A.G & A.P.G present in Court submit that official Respondents will act strictly in accordance with law and will provide due protection to the Petitioner within four corners of law. At this juncture, Counsel for the Petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of the Petition in said terms. In view of the above, instant Petition stands disposed of with directions to concerned SHO(s) to act strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection to the Petitioners, as and when approached.

At this juncture, Counsel for the Petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of the Petition in said terms. In view of the above, instant Petition stands disposed of with directions to concerned SHO(s) to act strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection to the Petitioners, as and when approached. However, it is made clear that this order shall not affect proceedings already pending against the Petitioner before the competent Court(s) of law. JUDGE Ali.
